meta.title: Work Experience
meta.subtitle: Professional experience building scalable backend systems, AI-driven applications, Android apps, and leadership roles across industry and academia.
meta.description: Detailed overview of professional work experience including software engineering roles, AI projects, Android development, leadership positions, and technologies used in real-world environments.

summary.headline: Full Stack Software Engineer | AI-Focused Backend Developer
summary.overview: Passionate Full Stack Software Engineer experienced in building scalable backend systems, normalized databases, AI-driven platforms, and modern web and mobile applications. Currently exploring AI Engineering with a focus on LLMs, Generative AI, and intelligent systems.

company.name: Keshav Encon Private Limited
company.description: An enterprise-focused organization delivering scalable software solutions with strong emphasis on database architecture, backend systems, and real-world problem solving.

experiences.description: Working as a Software Development Engineer building scalable systems from scratch, focusing on database normalization, backend architecture, and AI-powered applications.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented scalable databases following 3NF principles
Built backend systems from scratch enabling real-time data updates
Analyzed data fields from 50+ websites to design industry-standard schemas
Collaborated with team members to deliver production-grade solutions

achievements.title: AI Resume Platform at Scale
achievements.description: Designed and integrated a normalized database handling data from over 10,000 resumes using LLM-powered processing.

projects.name: AI Resume Management System
projects.description: Built an AI-powered resume platform integrating Gemma API and Google Colab for large-scale resume ingestion and processing.
projects.outcome: Enabled dynamic resume uploads and real-time structured data extraction at scale.

projects.name: CRM System
projects.description: Designed and implemented a custom CRM database aligned with industrial standards and client requirements.
projects.outcome: Delivered a scalable and maintainable CRM solution with strong data integrity.

projects.name: Online Examination System
projects.description: Developed a normalized examination system with optimized workflows and custom algorithms.
projects.outcome: Project recognized by organizations like L&T and ABB for innovation and practical application.

feedback.review: Built complex systems from scratch with strong architectural clarity and scalability.

company.name: Code Vimarsh
company.description: A technical student-led community at The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda focused on technology, leadership, and community growth.

experiences.description: Serving as Vice President, leading technical initiatives, mentoring students, and managing large-scale academic and community activities.
responsibilities: Managed an executive board of 14+ members
Led a web development team of 30+ juniors

achievements.title: Large-Scale Student Leadership
achievements.description: Successfully guided and mentored hundreds of students through technical and career-focused initiatives.

feedback.review: Exceptional leadership and ability to inspire large student communities.

company.name: iTechNotion Private Limited
company.description: A mobile-focused software company delivering Android applications for real-world use cases.

experiences.description: Worked on an Android City Directory application with real-time maps and API integrations.
responsibilities: Fetched and integrated data from company APIs
Built advanced splash screens using full-screen UI

achievements.title: Production-Ready Android UI
achievements.description: Implemented Material Design 3-based UI from Figma designs.

projects.name: City Directory Android Application
projects.description: Developed a city directory app featuring maps, navigation, and dynamic data.
projects.outcome: Delivered a functional Android application aligned with modern UI standards.

feedback.review: Delivered clean UI and handled complex integrations efficiently.
